hyperedges.label: RiesgoVial Prediction Pipeline: Request → Features → Model → Explain
Model Training & Export Pipeline: Notebook → export_models → model_knowledge
Feature Engineering Core Concepts: Grid + Cyclic Encoding + Target Encoding
RAG Pipeline: TF-IDF over Medellín Documents for Chat
Training Pipeline: Feature Engineering → XGBoost → PKL Export → API
Deployment Stack: API + Nginx + Frontend served via Docker Compose
